name: Simsol Golf
address: 20418 E Walnut Dr N #1g, Walnut, CA 91789
about: SimSol Golf designs premium simulator rooms tailored to individual lifestyles. They specialize in transforming unused home spaces like garages or spare rooms into complete golf simulator studios, offering both golf simulation and entertainment features. The service includes professional-grade installations with real-time data analysis and customizable designs to fit specific spaces, budgets, and performance goals.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time swing data and video analysis for performance improvement
Customizable simulator rooms designed for specific spaces and lifestyles
Professional-grade launch monitors and technology for accurate tracking
